response:
MOORE
SPECULATION SUGGESTS THAT MOORE'S LAW WILL CEASE TO HOLD AS PHYSICAL LIMITS OF SILICON TRANSISTORS ARE REACHED AROUND THE MID TO LATE 2020S WHEN FEATURE SIZES APPROACH ATOMIC DIMENSIONS AND QUANTUM EFFECTS DOMINATE DEVICE BEHAVIOR
***
ALTERNATIVE ARCHITECTURES LIKE THREE DIMENSIONAL STACKING OR NEW MATERIALS MAY EXTEND THE TREND TEMPORARILY BUT THE ORIGINAL PREDICTION OF DOUBLING SPEED EVERY TWO YEARS WILL EVENTUALLY FAIL DUE TO THERMAL AND POWER CONSTRAINTS THAT CANNOT BE OVERCOME BY SHRINKING ALONE
MOORE
